_comment: This is the per-machine override template. Copy this file to
.opencode/opencode.local.json and edit the copy. The values
defined here are merged on top of the tracked opencode.json,
with the local copy winning. opencode.local.json is gitignored,
so your machine-specific paths and tokens never reach the repo.
- extra tools that should be denied on a locked-down workstation
- environment-specific instructions appended to the system prompt
The merge shape mirrors opencode.json: any nested dict is
recursively merged, any other value replaces. To UNSET a value
set it to null. See scripts/sync_opencode_agents.py for the

bash._comment_underscore_key_is_dropped_at_me: Keys starting with _ are not valid OpenCode config; they exist only as in-file docs.

instructions: Override example: on this machine, prefer 'podman' over 'docker' in all generated commands.
